title: ‘Listen to grassroots, or extremism grows’, EU civil society is essential, says Boland [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Over 100 days into his mandate, EESC President Séamus Boland says his priority is placing civil society at the heart of Europe
summary_public: Over 100 days into his mandate, EESC President Séamus Boland says his priority is placing civil society at the heart of Europe
